name: Stably AI
long_description:
We build devtools. Orca is an open-source Cursor—a local-first AI coding environment. Stably is our AI testing platform that writes, runs, and maintains E2E tests in CI.                                                                      
                                    
Developers use Orca and Stably to ship faster with more control—coding with their own AI setup and merging with confidence in minutes.
one_liner: Makers of Orca (OSS Cursor) and Stably (AI testing platform)
